commit.message:
Show actual path in branch-worktree mismatch warning (#1377)

The mismatch warning previously only showed the expected path, leaving
users
guessing what the actual location was. Now shows both.

Before: `▲ Branch-worktree mismatch; expected feature @
~/workspace/project.feature ⚑`
After: `▲ Branch-worktree mismatch: feature @ ~/w/project.alias,
expected @ ~/workspace/project.feature ⚑`

> _This was written by Claude Code on behalf of @max-sixty_

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add stale thread detection for email follow-up tracking

Implements a systemic follow-up tracking system that:

commit.message:
Replace delete button with edit form for custom events

Selected local events now show an edit (pencil) button instead of a
delete button. Clicking it opens AddEventForm pre-populated with the
event's values. Delete is available inside the form with confirmation.

Custom event operations use replaceState instead of router.push to
update the URL without triggering a server re-render, preventing the
timeline animation from playing twice.

commit.message:
Body-state predictors: data collection, training, 3 horizon models

Predictive models for FEP integration. Predict body state residuals
(Δvx, Δvy, Δwz, Δroll, Δpitch, Δyaw) at 100ms, 200ms, 500ms horizons.

- collect_training_data.py: 16 episodes of varied gaits (ramps, turns,
  speed steps, sinusoidal), 51K samples at 100Hz, all hardware-compatible
  sensors (IMU, foot contacts, joint torques)
- train_predictor.py: MLP with precision-weighted MSE loss (surprise).
  Model learns per-dimension precision — roll/pitch dominate (π=999K)
  confirming stability is the primary predictable signal
- 3 trained models (83KB each): sub-degree orientation prediction at
  all horizons, velocity RMSE 2.7-4.9 cm/s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix image upload Invalid JWT by using supabase.functions.invoke()

The VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in Vercel is in the new sb_publishable_* format.
The Supabase JS client handles this format internally, but when passed
manually as Authorization: Bearer <key>, the edge function gateway rejects
it with "Invalid JWT".

Replace the raw fetch() call with supabase.functions.invoke() which handles
auth automatically and always sends the correct token (using the active
session JWT for authenticated admin users, falling back to anon key).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: persist score decay via nightly cron, replace decayed_score with original_score

- Add migration 006: original_score column stores immutable raw score;
  score column is now the live decayed value updated by cron
- Add internal/cron/decay.go: goroutine targeting 10pm EST daily that
  calls DecayAllProblems to update score = ApplyDecay(original_score, solved_at)
- Wire cron + graceful shutdown (signal.NotifyContext) in main.go;
  add _ "time/tzdata" for America/New_York in Docker
- Remove ApplyDecay from service List/ListFiltered/GetStats — DB value is authoritative
- Handler: replace decayed_score with original_score in problemResponse
- Frontend: collapse Score + Decayed columns into one Score cell showing
  inline decay delta (e.g. "73 −12") when original_score > score

Complete Phase 4: Foundation slice designs (slices 3-6)

Create detailed slice design documents for remaining Foundation slices:
- 006-slice.auth-rbac.md: JWT RS256, bcrypt, RBAC decorators, rate limiting (2/5 effort)
- 007-slice.observability.md: structlog JSON logging, health checks, security headers, audit events, RateLimitManager (1/5 effort)

- 010-slice.mobile-scaffold.md: React Native Expo with location permissions, Android config (2/5 effort)

Each design includes:
- Clear goals and technical scope
- Directory structure and file layout
- Failing test outline (TDD-first approach)
- Dependencies and effort estimates
- Integration points and special considerations

Phase 4 complete. Phase 5 (Task Breakdown) ready to begin with Slice 3 (Auth & RBAC).

fix: speed up peer discovery for new node connections

Reduce timers that gate discovery speed:
- Identify delay: 3s → 1.5s (known-peer address save)
- Early re-dial: 2s → 1s (known-peers sweep after boot)
- Reconnect/discovery interval: 10s → 5s (sweep frequency)
- Peer exchange on-connect: 500ms → 200ms (share peers faster)
- Early peer exchange sweeps: [10s, 30s] → [3s, 10s] (mesh formation)

commit.message:
Fix bridge firmware: E-Blocks 3 Mega uses Serial2 for USB, not Serial

The E-Blocks 3 Mega routes USB to Serial2 (UART2, pins 16/17).
Bridge now correctly forwards Serial2 (USB) <-> Serial3 (display).

Use rainbow-colored dots in Ch19 stereogram instead of B&W

The stereogram was using only palette indices 0/1 (black/white) despite
having a full rainbow palette. This made the image trivially identifiable
as a random-dot stereogram and was thematically wrong for "Roy G Biv".

Now uses palette indices 2-22 (R/O/Y/G/B/I/V color variants) as dot
values. Noise corruption also updated for multi-valued pixels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: disable aggressive HTML caching that hid all deployments

ROOT CAUSE: Next.js was setting Cache-Control: s-maxage=31536000
(1 year!) on HTML pages. The user's browser and proxy cached the
old HTML indefinitely, making every deploy invisible.

Fix:
- Add Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate for all
  HTML pages (not static assets which use content-hashed filenames)
- Add dynamic = 'force-dynamic' to root layout to prevent
  static pre-rendering of client-side pages
- Add deployed app diagnostic tests (Playwright against production)

Verified: Playwright tests against deployed URL confirm app loads,
Excel upload works, and 0 JS errors across all pages.

Fix 500 on parts pages by removing no-store fetch override in supabase client

errors inside ISR pages (revalidate=86400), resulting in 500s for any
non-pre-generated part page. Reverting to the previous fetch config fixes this.

Fix Ctrl+V text paste in main prompt input

Ctrl+V only handled image paste, relying on bracketed paste for text.
GNOME Terminal and others don't always send bracketed paste sequences,
so text paste silently failed. Now reads text from clipboard directly
via Ctrl+V, same as the dialog prompt fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Intent フィルタ使用時のページネーションをフィルタ後に適用 (#185)

category/responseStatus/maxConfidence フィルタは IntentRecord（別コレクション）に
依存するため Firestore クエリでは処理できず、アプリ側で post-filter していた。
しかし offset/limit を Firestore レベルで適用していたため、フィルタ後のページが
疎になり hasMore も不正確になるバグがあった。

Intent フィルタがある場合は全件取得（上限2000）→ post-filter → アプリ側で
offset/limit を適用する方式に変更。フィルタなしの場合は従来の Firestore レベル
ページネーションを維持。

Closes #169

Co-authored-by: yasushihonda-acg <248675557+yasushihonda-acg@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
